Module 1: 	Sequences
!
Executive Summary
Sequences are what build anticipation for your product and pull people into
your marketing. This is all about turning your launch into an event
!
Types of sequences
• 	Pre-prelaunch
• 	“The shot across the bow” - this is how you tell people something
is coming soon
• 	This is also where you build buzz before you even release
prelaunch content
• 	Prelaunch
• 	Sideways Sales Letter
• 	Three pieces of PLC
• 	Your goal should be to make the sale before cart even opens
• 	Launch (Open Cart)
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.

-- 1 of 2 --

• 	At the end of your open cart period your offer must go away or
change
• 	Post-Launch
• 	Now it’s time to take care of your customers and partners
• 	Make sure to follow up with your prospects that did not purchase
• 	Relaunch
• 	You can use your existing prelaunch sequence and go through
the same launch again - that’s what makes launches so great -
each one builds on the next
• 	Joint Venture/Affiliate
• 	You can use the prelaunch sequence on your JV partners to get
them excited to promote for you
!
!
2	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
